serviceIntervals.task: Rear brake pads and discs - park brake drums / shoes

serviceNotes.Engine oil & filter: Changed from 12,000 km / 8 months (Toyota North America 7,500 mi / 7.5 month guide) to 15,000 km / 12 months for EU priority: matches Subaru Europe policy and Toyota’s European 15,000 km / 10,000 mi oil-change wording for the GT86 family. North American owners should follow the printed Toyota USA maintenance guide if it specifies shorter intervals.
serviceNotes.Cabin air filter: 30,000 km / 24 months replacement cadence under normal driving (aligned with Subaru-BRZ-FA20 / FA24 pattern for the twin).
serviceNotes.Air filter element: Changed from 48,000 km / 30 months to 45,000 km / 36 months to match Subaru ZD8/FA24 first air-cleaner replace rhythm and Toyota NZ ‘C’-service pattern on the later twin; appropriate EU-aligned interval for FA20 ZN6.
serviceNotes.Spark plugs (Iridium type): 96,500 km / 72 months: same FA20 specification as Subaru BRZ North American ~60,000-mile iridium interval (KBB BRZ).
serviceNotes.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): 24-month time basis for DOT4; EU and Toyota/Subaru twin practice.
serviceNotes.Front brake pads and discs: Inspect each 15,000 km / 12 month service (EU-aligned rhythm).
serviceNotes.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: Inspect each 15,000 km / 12 month service alongside the front axle.
serviceNotes.Rear diff oil: 77,000 km / 48 months: Subaru of North America BRZ specification (48 months / 48,000 miles) for the shared ZN6/ZC6 rear axle.
serviceNotes.Manual transmission oil: 77,000 km / 48 months: Subaru of North America BRZ manual gearbox oil interval for the shared transmission.
serviceNotes.Engine / Heater Coolant: Changed from 217,000 km / 132 months (Toyota USA 135,000-mile first replace) to 120,000 km / 96 months per Subaru MY22+ BRZ/WRX handbook coolant R at H service, applied to FA20 BRZ/86 long-life coolant specification for EU-aligned tracking.
serviceNotes.Fuel filter: 77,000 km / 48 months: Subaru of North America BRZ fuel filter interval (shared D-4S application).
serviceNotes.Auto transmission fluid: Subaru of North America BRZ lists ATF inspect at 48 months / 48,000 miles; preventive exchange at 77,000 km / 48 months when fluid is dark (REC).

serviceSources.Engine oil & filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever comes first) for European Subaru (ZD8/ZC6 twin policy). https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — North America 86: 7,500 miles / 7.5 months (superseded for this file by EU 15,000 km / 12 month priority).
serviceSources.Cabin air filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: cabin filter per manual. https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — Toyota 86 cabin air filter conditions and scheduled log.
serviceSources.Air filter element: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: engine air filter per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — BRZ air cleaner first R at 45,000 km / 36 months (FA platform pattern). https://www.toyota.co.nz/globalassets/owners/servicing-your-toyota/gr-yaris-gr-corolla-gr86-service-requirements.pdf — GR86 ‘C’ 45,000 km air filter (twin lineage).
serviceSources.Spark plugs (Iridium type): https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: spark plugs per manual. https://www.kbb.com/subaru/brz/2018/spark-plug-replacement/ — BRZ FA20 ~60,000 miles (~96,500 km / 72 months). https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — Toyota 86 spark plugs at specified log intervals.
serviceSources.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: brake fluid per authorised repairer. https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — Toyota 86 brake fluid per maintenance log; 24-month DOT4 cadence.
serviceSources.Front brake pads and discs: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: brake inspection each 15,000 km service. https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — Toyota 86 brake pads and discs inspection each scheduled service.
serviceSources.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: brake inspection each scheduled service. https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — Toyota 86 rear brake inspection each scheduled service.
serviceSources.Rear diff oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: differential per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ rear differential 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months, ZN6/ZC6).
serviceSources.Manual transmission oil: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: gearbox oil per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ manual transmission oil 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceSources.Engine / Heater Coolant: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: coolant per manual. https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — BRZ coolant R 120,000 km / 96 months (supersedes Toyota USA 135,000-mile first replace for EU-aligned FA twin).
serviceSources.Fuel filter: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: fuel filter per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ fuel filter 48 months / 48,000 miles (~77,000 km / 48 months).
serviceSources.Auto transmission fluid: https://www.subaru.eu/service — EU: ATF per manual. https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — BRZ ATF inspect 48 months / 48,000 miles; preventive exchange at same km (REC).
